label: 联网研究循环
description: Split a research request into a web search query, search the web, assess whether evidence is sufficient, optionally search again, and write a grounded final answer.

state_1.name: request
state_1.description: Original research request from the user.
state_1.value: 帮我查询 GPT-5.5 的发布日期和模型亮点

state_2.name: search_query
state_2.description: Current web search query. The assessor may replace this with a refined follow-up query.

state_3.name: search_result
state_3.description: Compact report produced from the latest web search result.

state_4.name: research_notes
state_4.description: Accumulated evidence, gaps, and citations across search iterations.

state_5.name: needs_more_search
state_5.description: Whether the workflow should run another web search iteration.

state_6.name: final_answer
state_6.description: Final grounded answer generated from the accumulated research notes.

state_7.name: exhausted_answer
state_7.description: Best-effort answer generated when the search loop reaches its limit.

config.value: 帮我查询 GPT-5.5 的发布日期和模型亮点

plan_search_query.name: plan_search_query
plan_search_query.description: Turn the user request into the first focused web search query.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 request，生成一个适合联网搜索的英文或中英混合搜索 query。目标是找到权威来源，确认发布日期和模型亮点。只返回 JSON，字段 search_query 为搜索词，不要解释。

web_search_agent.name: web_search_agent
web_search_agent.description: Run the Web Search skill using the current query and convert the result into a compact evidence report.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 search_query，并使用 web_search 技能结果生成 search_result。search_result 必须包含：本轮搜索词、搜索日期、最相关证据摘要、至少 3 条引用链接；如果没有可靠结果，明确写出缺口。严格返回 JSON，字段 search_result 为 Markdown 字符串。

assess_search_sufficiency.name: assess_search_sufficiency
assess_search_sufficiency.description: Merge the latest search report into accumulated notes and decide whether another query is needed.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 request、search_query、search_result 和已有 research_notes。把本轮搜索证据合并进 research_notes，保留引用链接。判断是否已经足够回答 request：必须能覆盖发布日期和模型亮点，并优先有官方或高可信来源。如果信息不足，needs_more_search=true，并把 search_query 更新为下一轮更具体的补充搜索词；如果信息足够，needs_more_search=false，并保持 search_query 为当前或最有代表性的查询。严格返回 JSON，字段为 research_notes、needs_more_search、search_query。

need_more_search_check.name: need_more_search_check
need_more_search_check.description: Loop while the assessor requests another web search; otherwise continue to final answer.

final_answer_writer.name: final_answer_writer
final_answer_writer.description: Write the final answer once evidence is sufficient.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 request 和 research_notes，生成最终中文答案。必须分别回答发布日期和模型亮点，并附引用链接；如果证据中没有确认某项事实，明确说明未能确认，不要编造。严格返回 JSON，字段 final_answer 为 Markdown 字符串。

exhausted_answer_writer.name: exhausted_answer_writer
exhausted_answer_writer.description: Write a best-effort answer if the loop limit is reached before evidence is sufficient.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 request 和 research_notes。循环搜索已达上限，请基于已有证据生成一版谨慎答案。开头明确说明信息可能不足；必须区分已确认事实和未确认事项，并附已有引用链接。严格返回 JSON，字段 exhausted_answer 为 Markdown 字符串。

output_final_answer.name: output_final_answer
output_final_answer.description: Show the final grounded research answer.

output_exhausted_answer.name: output_exhausted_answer
output_exhausted_answer.description: Show the best-effort answer when the search loop reaches its limit.
